chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1152 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.4108/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 20.04.2022 Mr. Ali Asghar Chang, Advocate along-with petitioners. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh along-with SIP/S.H.O Ahmed Bux and ASI Ashraf P.S. Pithoro. == Mr. Atif Imran Khowaja, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.4 while statement of respondent No.2 is submitted by learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh those are taken on record. The statement of petitioner No.1 was recorded by the Investigating Officer of the case which is placed on record which gave a narration that she has embraced ‘Islam’ out of her own free will and that the contents of F.I.R wherein the allegation of her abduction was raised is a false statement made by the respondent No.4, who is mother of the petitioner No.1. This being a situation and in view of the facts and circumstances of the case, I.O may submit the challan in light of aforesaid statement of the petitioner No.1 before concerned Magistrate for passing appropriate orders. With this observation, petitions stands disposed off with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
